title: Benji's Survival Server Optional Pack
description: A client-side modpack to enhance the experience on benji's survival server
body:
A modpack created for benji's survival server. Contains mods that can be used on a vanilla server. Mostly performance mods aswell as a voice chat mod.

Features

- Dynamic FPS - When the game is in the background it reduces the FPS
- Entity Culling - Block/Entities that are not visible are not rendered
- FerriteCore - Reduced the amount of ram the game uses
- Iris Shaders - Shaders
- ModernFix - Performance and bug fixes
- Simple Voice Chat - Proximity based voice chat
- Sodium - Performance improvements
